note: This is JSON saved as .list on purpose. Edit this file to add, remove, reorder, or update games on the website.

games.title: Mehoy Menoy
games.creator: bartish behaviour
games.description: A GameJolt project from bartish behaviour. The page is linked here while the team waits on a final banner and short creator-written pitch.

games.title: Five Nights at Musical Rares 22 - 1 (FNaMR22-1)
games.creator: The Mr. DJ22
games.description: Survive five nights inside Musical's Pizza Party World. The job looks simple until the characters start acting alive.

games.title: Billy's Theatre Show ACT-1
games.creator: The Mr. DJ22
games.description: After losing Rodger's Pizza Playhouse, Andrés takes a job at the theatre that stole his character. The past follows him there, and the story ties into the FFD Saga.

games.title: Five Nights at Musical Rares - 1 "The Musical Investigation" [Recomposed]
games.creator: The Mr. DJ22
games.description: A remake of the original FNaMR experience, with updated graphics, reworked lore, returning characters, mechanics, and story pieces.

games.title: Fishery's Family Diner (Classic)
games.creator: CSB
games.description: A financially desperate night guard takes a job at an animatronic restaurant with a very bad history.

games.title: Fishery's Family Diner 2
games.creator: CSB
games.description: The same worker returns for a new summer job at the renovated Fishery's Family Diner.

games.title: Fishery's Family Diner 3
games.creator: CSB
games.description: In 1996, Daniel Stephans is hired to watch a horror attraction built around the mysteries of the older diner.

games.title: Fishery's Family Diner 4
games.creator: CSB
games.description: In 2008, Jena takes a job at a new horror attraction based on the still-unsolved Fishery's Family Diner case.

games.title: Fishery's Family Diner 5
games.creator: CSB
games.description: Ronald, a 26-year-old investigator, reopens a dropped case and follows what remains of the story back to the factory.

games.title: Fishery's Family Diner Overhaul
games.creator: CSB
games.description: An overhaul slot for the Fishery's Family Diner series. Drop in the official short pitch and banner when the creator sends them over.

games.title: Wyre
games.creator: reese's pieces
games.description: A wire-connection puzzle game about opening the way forward. More creator-provided text can be added later.

games.title: Five Nights at Musical Rares 22 - 2 "A Factory That Falls"
games.creator: The Mr. DJ22
games.description: A follow-up FNaMR22 fan game centered around the factory setting. Added from the extra GameJolt link in the team list.

games.title: Project: Unstuffed
games.creator: AlexFenixJRYT
games.description: In this game, you play as James. A 26 year old person trying to investigate on Fazbear Entertainment. He finds this job which lets him get some money out of it, but he is not safe. Not at all
